title: Fix all three timing leaks in an auth module
prompt: `test_fixtures/timing_attack_token_verify.ex` contains three timing-attack leaks: (1) API token compared with `==`, (2) HMAC signature compared with `==` after hash computation, (3) pattern match with `^token`. Rewrite the entire module so every comparison on a secret uses `Plug.Crypto.secure_compare/2`. Preserve the public function signatures `authenticate/2`, `verify_webhook_signature/3`, `check_match/2`. Write the corrected module to `lib/my_app/auth/api_key.ex`.
tier_rationale: Three distinct timing-attack variants in one file. Each fix is the same mechanical substitution but requires recognizing all three forms.
